title: mondaySDK().api() results in error on Account Settings View
excerpt:
Has anyone managed to use the monday-sdk-js in the Account Settings View. 
I am getting the following error when trying to perform api calls: 
  
The same call succeeds in an Item View

posts.author: timovanderkamp (Timo van der Kamp)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has anyone managed to use the monday-sdk-js in the Account Settings View.

I am getting the following error when trying to perform api calls:

image725×78 13.4 KB

The same call succeeds in an Item View

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @timovanderkamp

I’m not sure but I think it has to do with the lack of the authorization token. As far as I know there in no authorization when using the Account Settings view.

Did you manage to retrieve a session token?

posts.author: timovanderkamp (Timo van der Kamp)
posts.cookedHtml:
I also reached out to Developer Support. They confirmed to me that these ClientSDK functions are currently not working in the Account Settings View.

Expected to be fixed earliest next Monday (20-03-2023).

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone

As @timovanderkamp we are about to add SDK support for the account settings view.

This will be deployed soon (probably next week, no exact ETAs yet).

Cheers,
Matias
